2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 1:18, 'For the preaching of the cross is to them that perish foolishness; but unto us which are saved it is the power of God.'
2026-06-29.question: According to Paul, what is the preaching of the cross to them that perish?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 3:16, 'Know ye not that ye are the temple of God, and that the Spirit of God dwelleth in you?'
2026-06-29.question: What does Paul remind the Corinthian believers that they are?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 6:19, 'What? know ye not that your body is the temple of the Holy Ghost which is in you, which ye have of God, and ye are not your own?'
2026-06-29.question: To whom is our body a temple, as clarified by Paul?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 9:24, 'Know ye not that they which run in a race run all, but one receiveth the prize?'
2026-06-29.question: How many receive the prize among those who run in a race?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 10:13, 'God is faithful, who will not suffer you to be tempted above that ye are able.'
2026-06-29.question: Beyond what limit will God not allow men to be tempted?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 11:26, 'For as often as ye eat this bread, and drink this cup, ye do shew the Lord's death till he come.'
2026-06-29.question: What do believers proclaim whenever they partake in the Lord's supper?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 12:4, 'Now there are diversities of gifts, but the same Spirit.'
2026-06-29.question: Though there are diversities of gifts, what remains the same according to Paul?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 13:13, 'And now abideth faith, hope, charity, these three; but the greatest of these is charity.'
2026-06-29.question: Among faith, hope, and charity (love), which is the greatest?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 15:26, 'The last enemy that shall be destroyed is death.'
2026-06-29.question: What is identified as the last enemy that shall be destroyed?

2026-06-29.explanation: According to 1 Corinthians 15:45, 'The first man Adam was made a living soul; the last Adam was made a quickening spirit.'
2026-06-29.question: What was the last Adam made into, as described by Paul?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to 2 Corinthians 4:7, 'But we have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power may be of God, and not of us.'
2026-06-30.question: Where is the treasure of God's power held, according to Paul?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to 2 Corinthians 5:17, 'Therefore if any man be in Christ, he is a new creature: old things are passed away; behold, all things are become new.'
2026-06-30.question: If any man be in Christ, what is he?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to 2 Corinthians 9:7, 'Every man according as he purposeth in his heart, so let him give; not grudgingly, or of necessity: for God loveth a cheerful giver.'
2026-06-30.question: What kind of giver does God love?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to 2 Corinthians 12:9, 'And he said unto me, My grace is sufficient for thee: for my strength is made perfect in weakness.'
2026-06-30.question: When Paul prayed about the thorn in his flesh, what did the Lord say was sufficient for him?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to Galatians 2:20, 'I am crucified with Christ: nevertheless I live; yet not I, but Christ liveth in me.'
2026-06-30.question: After stating 'I am crucified with Christ,' who did Paul say lives in him?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to Galatians 3:11, 'But that no man is justified by the law in the sight of God, it is evident: for, The just shall live by faith.'
2026-06-30.question: According to the Epistle to the Galatians, how shall the just live?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to Galatians 5:1, 'Stand fast therefore in the liberty wherewith Christ hath made us free, and be not entangled again with the yoke of bondage.'
2026-06-30.question: What has Christ made believers, according to Paul's instruction to stand fast?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to Galatians 5:22-23, 'But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, Meekness, temperance.'
2026-06-30.question: What are love, joy, peace, and longsuffering collectively called?

2026-06-30.explanation: According to Galatians 6:7, 'Be not deceived; God is not mocked: for whatsoever a man soweth, that shall he also reap.'
2026-06-30.question: What is the consequence of whatsoever a man soweth, as warned by Paul?

2026-06-30.correct: The cross of our Lord Jesus Christ
2026-06-30.explanation: According to Galatians 6:14, 'But God forbid that I should glory, save in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ.'
2026-06-30.opt1: The cross of our Lord Jesus Christ
2026-06-30.question: In what did Paul say he would solely glory?

2026-07-01.correct: Before the foundation of the world
2026-07-01.explanation: According to Ephesians 1:4, 'According as he hath chosen us in him before the foundation of the world, that we should be holy and without blame before him in love.'
2026-07-01.opt2: Before the foundation of the world
2026-07-01.question: When did God choose us in Christ?

2026-07-01.explanation: According to Ephesians 2:8, 'For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of God.'
2026-07-01.question: Through faith, what are we saved by?

2026-07-01.explanation: According to Ephesians 4:5, 'One Lord, one faith, one baptism.'
2026-07-01.question: In listing 'one faith, one baptism,' what else does Paul declare is 'one'?

2026-07-01.correct: As Christ also loved the church
2026-07-01.explanation: According to Ephesians 5:25, 'Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the church, and gave himself for it.'
2026-07-01.opt3: As Christ also loved the church
2026-07-01.question: How did Paul instruct husbands to love their wives?

2026-07-01.explanation: According to Ephesians 6:17, 'And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God.'
2026-07-01.question: In the armor of God, what represents the 'sword of the Spirit'?

2026-07-01.explanation: According to Philippians 2:7, 'But made himself of no reputation, and took upon him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men.'
2026-07-01.question: What form did Christ take upon Himself when He made Himself of no reputation?

2026-07-01.correct: Forgetting those things which are behind
2026-07-01.explanation: According to Philippians 3:13-14, 'forgetting those things which are behind, and reaching forth unto those things which are before, I press toward the mark.'
2026-07-01.opt1: Forgetting those things which are behind
2026-07-01.question: While pressing toward the mark, what did Paul say he was forgetting?

2026-07-01.explanation: According to Philippians 3:20, 'For our conversation (citizenship) is in heaven; from whence also we look for the Saviour, the Lord Jesus Christ.'
2026-07-01.question: Where is the conversation (citizenship) of the believers located?

2026-07-01.explanation: According to Philippians 4:4, 'Rejoice in the Lord alway: and again I say, Rejoice.'
2026-07-01.question: In whom did Paul repeatedly command believers to rejoice?

2026-07-01.explanation: According to Philippians 4:13, 'I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.'
2026-07-01.question: On what basis did Paul say 'I can do all things'?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to Colossians 1:15, 'Who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature.'
2026-07-02.question: What is Christ in relation to the invisible God?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to Colossians 2:9, 'For in him dwelleth all the fulness of the Godhead bodily.'
2026-07-02.question: How does all the fulness of the Godhead dwell in Christ?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to Colossians 3:2, 'Set your affection on things above, not on things on the earth.'
2026-07-02.question: Where did Paul command believers to set their affection?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to 1 Thessalonians 4:16, 'For the Lord himself shall descend from heaven with a shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with the trump of God: and the dead in Christ shall rise first.'
2026-07-02.question: Who shall rise first at the coming of the Lord?

2026-07-02.correct: As a thief in the night
2026-07-02.explanation: According to 1 Thessalonians 5:2, 'For yourselves know perfectly that the day of the Lord so cometh as a thief in the night.'
2026-07-02.opt2: As a thief in the night
2026-07-02.question: How will the day of the Lord come, according to Paul?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to 1 Thessalonians 5:17, Paul gives a brief and clear command: 'Pray without ceasing.'
2026-07-02.question: What is the specific command given regarding prayer in 1 Thessalonians chapter 5?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to 2 Thessalonians 3:10, 'For even when we were with you, this we commanded you, that if any would not work, neither should he eat.'
2026-07-02.opt4: Neither should he come to the temple
2026-07-02.question: What did Paul command regarding a person who would not work?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to 1 Timothy 2:5, 'For there is one God, and one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus.'
2026-07-02.question: There is one God and one mediator between God and men; who is it?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to 1 Timothy 6:10, 'For the love of money is the root of all evil.'
2026-07-02.question: What did Paul tell Timothy is the root of all evil?

2026-07-02.explanation: According to 2 Timothy 3:16, 'All scripture is given by inspiration of God, and is profitable for doctrine, for reproof, for correction, for instruction in righteousness.'
2026-07-02.question: How is all scripture given, as clarified by Paul?

2026-07-03.explanation: According to Nahum 1:7, 'The LORD is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble; and he knoweth them that trust in him.'
2026-07-03.question: What is the LORD in the day of trouble, according to the prophet Nahum?

2026-07-03.explanation: The book of Nahum primarily prophesies the judgment upon Nineveh. Nahum 3:1 says, 'Woe to the bloody city! it is all full of lies and robbery.'
2026-07-03.question: Against which city did the prophet Nahum declare God's wrath, calling it the 'bloody city'?

2026-07-03.explanation: According to Habakkuk 2:2, 'And the LORD answered me, and said, Write the vision, and make it plain upon tables, that he may run that readeth it.'
2026-07-03.question: Where did the LORD command Habakkuk to make the vision plain?

2026-07-03.explanation: According to Habakkuk 2:4, 'but the just shall live by his faith.' (This verse is famously quoted by Paul in the New Testament).
2026-07-03.question: According to Habakkuk chapter 2, how shall the just live?

2026-07-03.correct: The knowledge of the glory of the LORD
2026-07-03.explanation: According to Habakkuk 2:14, 'For the earth shall be filled with the knowledge of the glory of the LORD, as the waters cover the sea.'
2026-07-03.opt3: The knowledge of the glory of the LORD
2026-07-03.question: What shall the earth be filled with, as the waters cover the sea?

2026-07-03.correct: I will rejoice in the LORD
2026-07-03.explanation: According to Habakkuk 3:17-18, 'Although the fig tree shall not blossom, neither shall fruit be in the vines... Yet I will rejoice in the LORD, I will joy in the God of my salvation.'
2026-07-03.opt2: I will rejoice in the LORD
2026-07-03.question: Even if crops fail and flocks are cut off, what did Habakkuk resolve to do?

2026-07-03.explanation: According to Zephaniah 1:14, 'The great day of the LORD is near, it is near, and hasteth greatly.'
2026-07-03.question: What is stated regarding the 'great day of the LORD' in Zephaniah's prophecy?

2026-07-03.explanation: According to Zephaniah 2:3, 'Seek ye the LORD, all ye meek of the earth, which have wrought his judgment.'
2026-07-03.question: What important call did Zephaniah give to the meek of the earth?

2026-07-03.explanation: According to Zephaniah 3:17, 'The LORD thy God in the midst of thee is mighty; he will save, he will rejoice over thee with joy.'
2026-07-03.question: What word did Zephaniah use to describe the LORD thy God in the midst of thee?

2026-07-03.explanation: According to Zephaniah 3:9, 'For then will I turn to the people a pure language, that they may all call upon the name of the LORD, to serve him with one consent.'
2026-07-03.question: What will God turn to the people so that they may call upon the name of the LORD with one consent?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Haggai 1:5, 'Now therefore thus saith the LORD of hosts; Consider your ways.'
2026-07-04.question: What command did the LORD give to the people who were living in their cieled houses while His house lay waste?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Haggai 2:9, 'The glory of this latter house shall be greater than of the former, saith the LORD of hosts.'
2026-07-04.question: In Haggai's prophecy, how will the glory of the latter house compare to the former?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Zechariah 3:3, 'Now Joshua was clothed with filthy garments, and stood before the angel.'
2026-07-04.question: In the vision, what was Joshua the high priest clothed with initially?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Zechariah 4:6, 'Not by might, nor by power, but by my spirit, saith the LORD of hosts.'
2026-07-04.question: What did God tell Zerubbabel would accomplish the work, instead of might or power?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Zechariah 8:4, 'There shall yet old men and old women dwell in the streets of Jerusalem, and every man with his staff in his hand for very age.'
2026-07-04.question: Who does the prophecy say will dwell in the streets of Jerusalem with their staffs in the days of blessing?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Zechariah 9:9, 'behold, thy King cometh unto thee: he is just, and having salvation; lowly, and riding upon an ass, and upon a colt the foal of an ass.'
2026-07-04.question: How did Zechariah prophesy that the King of Zion would come?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Zechariah 11:12, 'So they weighed for my price thirty pieces of silver.' (A prophecy fulfilled when Judas betrayed Jesus).
2026-07-04.question: What price was weighed out as the wages for the shepherd prophet?

2026-07-04.correct: Upon me whom they have pierced
2026-07-04.explanation: According to Zechariah 12:10, 'And I will pour upon the house of David, and upon the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the spirit of grace and of supplications: and they shall look upon me whom they have pierced, and they shall mourn for him.'
2026-07-04.opt3: Upon me whom they have pierced
2026-07-04.question: Upon whom will the inhabitants of Jerusalem look and mourn, as one mourneth for his only son?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Zechariah 13:7, 'smite the shepherd, and the sheep shall be scattered' (This was quoted regarding the disciples fleeing when Jesus was arrested).
2026-07-04.question: What is prophesied to happen after 'smite the shepherd'?

2026-07-04.explanation: According to Zechariah 14:4, 'And his feet shall stand in that day upon the mount of Olives, which is before Jerusalem on the east.'
2026-07-04.question: Where will the Lord's feet stand on the day of His coming, according to Zechariah?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 1:2-3, 'yet I loved Jacob, And I hated Esau, and laid his mountains and his heritage waste.'
2026-07-05.question: When the LORD said 'I loved Jacob,' whom did He say He hated?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 1:8, 'And if ye offer the blind for sacrifice, is it not evil? and if ye offer the lame and sick, is it not evil?'
2026-07-05.question: What kind of animal did the priests offer on the altar, dishonoring God in Malachi's time?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 2:16, 'For the LORD, the God of Israel, saith that he hateth putting away (divorce).'
2026-07-05.question: What does the LORD God of Israel state that He hates regarding marriage?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 3:6, 'For I am the LORD, I change not; therefore ye sons of Jacob are not consumed.'
2026-07-05.question: What attribute does God declare about Himself to assure the sons of Jacob they are not consumed?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 3:8, 'Will a man rob God? Yet ye have robbed me. But ye say, Wherein have we robbed thee? In tithes and offerings.'
2026-07-05.question: In what specific way did the Lord accuse the Israelites of robbing Him?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 3:10, 'Bring ye all the tithes into the storehouse... and prove me now herewith, saith the LORD of hosts, if I will not open you the windows of heaven, and pour you out a blessing.'
2026-07-05.question: If they bring all the tithes into the storehouse, what did God promise to open to pour out a blessing?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 3:16, 'Then they that feared the LORD spake often one to another: and the LORD hearkened, and heard it, and a book of remembrance was written before him for them that feared the LORD.'
2026-07-05.question: What was written before the LORD for them that feared Him and thought upon His name?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 4:2, 'But unto you that fear my name shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings.'
2026-07-05.question: What shall arise with healing in His wings for those who fear God's name?

2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 4:5, 'Behold, I will send you Elijah the prophet before the coming of the great and dreadful day of the LORD.'
2026-07-05.question: Whom did God promise to send before the coming of the great and dreadful day of the LORD?

2026-07-05.correct: The heart of the fathers to the children
2026-07-05.explanation: According to Malachi 4:6, 'And he shall turn the heart of the fathers to the children, and the heart of the children to their fathers, lest I come and smite the earth with a curse.'
2026-07-05.opt2: The heart of the fathers to the children
2026-07-05.question: Whose hearts will the coming prophet turn in order to prevent the earth from being smitten with a curse?
